description: Style NoteWhat could make you look better than a nice pair of heels while wearing a dress or a skirt? In fact, people wear heels even with jeans and it looks amazing. A nice pair of stilettos from catwalk is just what you need.Product DetailsBlunt toed stilettos with a bronze footbedA transparent mesh at the forefoot with crystal embellishmentCrystal embellishments on heel and heel baseTPU outsole and heel patch with pattern grovesHeel: 4& rdquo Material and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
